description_long: This is a modern, tactical-style rifle with a matte black finish, featuring a collapsible stock and a detachable box magazine. The rifle has a prominent handguard with Picatinny rails along the top, allowing for the attachment of various accessories. The barrel is of standard length and appears to be fitted with a basic flash hider at the muzzle. The receiver is robust, with a visible fire selector and ergonomic pistol grip for improved handling. Iron sights are integrated into the top rail, providing basic aiming capability. The overall design is streamlined and utilitarian, suitable for urban environments and close-quarters scenarios.
description: A matte black tactical rifle with a collapsible stock, detachable magazine, Picatinny rails, and iron sights.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel's end, flash hider, and a narrow profile of the handguard and stock.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the rifle, collapsible stock, pistol grip, magazine, and Picatinny rail.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the buttstock and the alignment of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rifle's profile, including the magazine, stock, and handguard details.
